ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., experiment, simulation) */,
  "experiment_settings" TEXT /* Experiment settings used to collect the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tags for easier categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., RangeX, MeanY, VarZ) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., Range, Mean, Variance, Skewness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., integer, float, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data type */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data type has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the value belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type of the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feature value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feature value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature value */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature value has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the label belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the label */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the label */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the label has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_values" (
  "label_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label value */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label the value belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the label value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the label value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the label value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the label value */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the label value has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_label_values_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the access attempt failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_provenance" (
  "provenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provenance entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being tracked */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "processing_steps" TEXT /* Processing steps applied to the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the provenance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the provenance entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the provenance entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the provenance entry */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provenance entry has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_provenance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collaboration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaboration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the collaboration */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the collaboration has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Specific permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been marked for deletion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
